positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for height_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    peter != windy).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    in_class(michael,michael_class)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    taller(peter,michael)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    michael != peter).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~in_class(X0,michael_class) | taller(michael,X0) | michael = X0).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    man(michael)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~taller(X1,X2) | ~taller(X0,X1) | taller(X0,X2)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    ~in_class(X0,michael_class) | ~man(X0) | ~taller(X0,peter)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    man(windy)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    man(peter)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~taller(X0,peter) | taller(X0,michael)).

cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    ~taller(michael,peter)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    michael != windy).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
